productDisplayName: Ivory Tag Yellow Plaid Laptop Bag
description: Yellow checked laptop bag with two short handles for carrying ease Branding on the front and strap and rivet details on the front and back for style Strap and buckle details on the sides with press buttoned closure for a compact look One external insert pocket on the front One main zippered compartment with two slots, and inner zipped pocket in-between, an insert pocket and an inner zipped pocket on the sides, pen holders and key chain holder on the inside Padded interlining to keep the laptop safe One external insert pocket at the back
